title: SpaceAnalyticalFragment
description: SpaceAnalyticalFragment: Fragment containing space analytical properties (e.g. domestic hot water supply, daylight factor, heating and cooling sizing method)

InternalDomesticHotWater.description: The amount of internal domestic hot water supply for the space

FacadeLength.description: The length of the space enclsoure that is adjacent to the outdoors

SizeCoolingMethod.description: The cooling size method of the space. Use SizingMethod enum

SizeHeatingMethod.description: The heating size method of the space. Use SizingMethod enum

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
